caption: Several men stand outside a wooden structure, possibly a truck or trailer, under a beige tarp. One man wears a bright red shirt, another a blue and white checkered button-down, and others wear olive green or blue work clothes. In the beginning, the men are gathered around the opening of the structure, with the man in the checkered shirt reaching up toward the tarp. As the sequence progresses, he and another man in a green shirt work together to lift and pull back the tarp, revealing a dark interior. The men are positioned with their backs to the viewer, focusing their attention on the task of uncovering the cargo area. The setting appears to be an outdoor, rural environment with dry ground and distant greenery visible in the background. No text or logos are present in the scene.
